scripts.build: pnpm run build:maps:leaflet && pnpm run build:maps:maplibre && pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:layers && pnpm run build:storybook
scripts.lint: eslint packages/storybook/.storybook packages/core/src packages/layers/src packages/maps/leaflet/src packages/maps/maplibre/src packages/storybook/src packages/core/vite.config.js packages/maps/leaflet/vite.config.js packages/maps/maplibre/vite.config.js packages/layers/vite.config.js --ext .js,.jsx
scripts.lint:fix: eslint packages/storybook/.storybook packages/core/src packages/layers/src packages/maps/leaflet/src packages/maps/maplibre/src packages/storybook/src packages/core/vite.config.js packages/maps/leaflet/vite.config.js packages/maps/maplibre/vite.config.js packages/layers/vite.config.js --ext .js,.jsx --fix
